TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Du Chongming == Piharatengan to kapatay romi'ad ni Du Chongming ising ​Ci Du Chongming hakasi (1893miheca 8 folad 25 romi'ad－1986 miheca 2 folad 25 romi'ad), masofoc i pikowan no Mancin kitakit a sakowan itira i Sanzhi no Tansui, nano emangan ko tadamaan no kacingangan, mafenekay tamdaw, misawad i Hobu koritsu kakko o saka cecay pakaala to "Taywan sotokufu ikaku-in", marikec ko pikowan no micalapay sifo no Dipong to saki Hokaku sici kakupu, o kalaising ko safaloco'an no kaemangay no Taywan itiya. ​Macodahay kapah milimek sapipatayan ci Yuan Shikai ​I 1910 miheca Mancin kitakit makerih to sapisadadahalaw to Taywan, nika mafiyol no kapot a mitilid ci Weng Junmingan, oya ci Du Congming aci Jiang Weishui miceroh to Conghua kemintang, ikor marepet ni Yuan Shikai ko Congko sakowan, o na tatayra ci Du Congming aci Weng Junming i Beijing itiya i, misahalaka kao masekel ko sapipatay ci Yuan Shikaian, nika tada makedec ko mitena'ay misimaw caay aca ka laheci. ​​Tada o marokrokay ko sapikapotaw to Congko a miceroh, matiya o nipitilid k nika tadamaan ningra, i pikowan no Dipong to Taywan itiya, o sakacecay kacingangan ningra misawad to ising kakko, saka madama no pitilidan tayra i Dipong a mitilid haca, malaheci pakaala to Kyoto teikoku daikaku ikakupu, minanam to iyo kakko ato Yakuri-gakuoyopi naika. ​​​I 1922 miheca, pakaala to hakasi no ikakko ci Du Chongming, saka nicalapan kanatal no Dipong kitakit, o sakacecay pakaalaay to hakasi to Teikoku daigaku igakupu a taywam tamdaw, saki rayray no Taywan o sakacecay ikakko a hakasi. ​​​​Paherek ko katadamaan to nipitilid i, caay ka siday cingra i Diong matayal, minokay tayni niyaro' a Taywan, citodong to Cisi ikakupu kyosu, ikor onini pitilidan palekapotan to Taypi Teikoku daikaku, saka aniniay a "Kokuritsu Taywan daigaku igakupu". Misafaloco' miterek to 'icel saki isingan no Taywan ​I 1945 miheca saka 2 kalaloodan, micada mikowan ko komintang to Taywan, miocor ko hakasi no Cuo kenkyuyin ci Luo Zongluo to kacitodong tayal i Taihoku teikoku daikaku. Nawhani awaay cango'ot ko inanengay tamdaw no komintang to tadamanay to isingan tamdaw, nanoya tahidangen o sakacecay isingan hakasi ci Du Chongming ato kacatorod to isingan ato kasacitodongan pasifana'ay no Dipong. ​​Kafangafangan to 228 itiya, mala o miDayhiway to yinciw no Ikakupu ci Du Chongming, misi'ayaw to kafafalic kararawraw no taliyok a to'ac, misa'icel to isingan no Taywan ci Du Chongming itiya, limela to nipatirengan no Dipong a isingan to macowatay ikakotay, saka masongila' ko picada no komintang mikowan. Patireng to ikakoka i Takao ​Nikawrira, padadoedo saan miocor ko komintang ci Fu Sinian aci Qian Siliang mala 'a'isidan no Taywan daykako, caay ka tatami aci Du Chongming ko harateng a mikiwiko, kinapinapina masasiwtoc. Saka i 1954 miheca, liyas sato ci Du Chongming to Taywan daykako, misa'icel patireng to no finawlan no Taywan saka cecay ikako daykako – Takao sikakoyin, sarakatay patireng a 'a'isidan. ​​Micikeroh to kiwiko to Takao ikako i, micikeroh ci Du Chongming hakasi to no niyah ikako no Taywan ikoako kingkiw matiya to tadamaan ko nidemakan. Misarocod misa'opo to tadamaanay tamdaw sakapot, pakayni to itiyaay tadancaay syakay no Taywan: Apiyan, Mafiy, cisawarakay oner ko nikingkiwan a tayal. ​​I nipikerid ni Du Chongming, dengan o adadaay mapadipot to fa'elohay ikako, mapatireng macakat ko saki aniniay no Taywan a ikako kingkiw a katadamaan, micowat to oneran remas ato sapaiyo, kinapinapina mihapiw to misolapan a ratoh ato nikingkiwan a tilidan. ​​Saka "ikaka ko ninanaman, sakacecay ko nikingkiwan" o tadamaanay nisafaloco'an no 'orip ningra koni. O tadamama no aniniay ikako no Taywan ​Nengnengen ko 'orip ni Du Chongming, mataneng ningra ko no Mancin sakowan, picalap no Dipong ato piepec sakowan no komintang, talacowa caay ka lecad to ni Jiang Weishui misarocod to sician a sofal, nika ci Du Chongming hakasi o katadamaan ningra ko sapaini to syakay no Taywan, o kodait faloco' no malaisingay, saki ikako tadamaan sofal pa'orip to 'alomanay tamdaw, itini i pisa'icel ningra, o Takao ikako daykako, Taywan ikakoyin, ka'amis ko cecay katimol ko cecay, o pipatireng parana'an to tanektekay saki ikoao isingan ato ikako kiwiko aniniay no Taywan.
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ == piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ isiŋ *ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi (****miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), maso~ufo~uʦ i piko~uwan no~u manʦin kitakit a sako~uwan itira i san*ħi no~u tanso~u~ui, nano~u əmaŋan ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kaʦiŋaŋan, mafənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw, misawaɬ~ɮ i ħo~ub~b~vo~u~u ko~uritso~u~u kakko~u o~u saka ʦəʦaj pakaaɾa to~u "tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u ikako~u~u-in", marikəʦ ko~u piko~uwan no~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u saki ħo~ukako~u~u siʦi kako~u~upo~u~u, o~u kaɾaisiŋ ko~u safaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u kaəmaŋaj no~u tajwan itija. *maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj kapaħ miɾimək sapipatajan ʦi jo~u~uan sħikai *i **** miħəʦa manʦin kitakit makəriħ to~u sapisaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaw to~u tajwan, nika mafijo~uɾ no~u kapo~ut a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi wəŋ *o~u~unmiŋan, o~uja ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦo~uŋmiŋ aʦi *iaŋ wəisħo~u~ui miʦəro~uħ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua kəmintaŋ, iko~ur marəpət ni jo~u~uan sħikai ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u sako~uwan, o~u na tatajra ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦo~uŋmiŋ aʦi wəŋ *o~u~unmiŋ i b~b~vəijiŋ itija i, misaħaɾaka kao~u masəkəɾ ko~u sapipataj ʦi jo~u~uan sħikaian, nika taɬ~ɮa makəɬ~ɮəʦ ko~u mitənaʡaj misimaw ʦaaj aʦa ka ɾaħəʦi. **taɬ~ɮa o~u maro~ukro~ukaj ko~u sapikapo~utaw to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a miʦəro~uħ, matija o~u nipitiɾiɬ~ɮ k nika taɬ~ɮamaan niŋra, i piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan itija, o~u sakaʦəʦaj kaʦiŋaŋan niŋra misawaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋ kakko~u, saka maɬ~ɮama no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħaʦa, maɾaħəʦi pakaaɾa to~u kjo~uto~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u ikako~u~upo~u~u, minanam to~u ijo~u kakko~u ato~u jako~u~uri-*ako~u~uo~ujo~upi naika. ***i **** miħəʦa, pakaaɾa to~u ħakasi no~u ikakko~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, saka niʦaɾapan kanataɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kitakit, o~u sakaʦəʦaj pakaaɾaaj to~u ħakasi to~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮai*ako~u~u i*ako~u~upo~u~u a tajwam tamɬ~ɮaw, saki rajraj no~u tajwan o~u sakaʦəʦaj ikakko~u a ħakasi. ****paħərək ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan to~u nipitiɾiɬ~ɮ i, ʦaaj ka siɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra i ɬ~ɮio~uŋ matajaɾ, mino~ukaj tajni nijaro~uʡ a tajwan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦisi ikako~u~upo~u~u kjo~uso~u~u, iko~ur o~unini pitiɾiɬ~ɮan paɾəkapo~utan to~u tajpi təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u, saka aniniaj a "ko~uko~u~uritso~u~u tajwan ɬ~ɮai*ako~u~u i*ako~u~upo~u~u". misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ mitərək to~u ʡiʦəɾ saki isiŋan no~u tajwan *i **** miħəʦa saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, miʦaɬ~ɮa miko~uwan ko~u ko~umintaŋ to~u tajwan, mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ħakasi no~u ʦo~u~uo~u kənkjo~u~ujin ʦi ɾo~u~uo~u *o~uŋɾo~u~uo~u to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ tajaɾ i taiħo~uko~u~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u. nawħani awaaj ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u inanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ko~umintaŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj to~u isiŋan tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja taħiɬ~ɮaŋən o~u sakaʦəʦaj isiŋan ħakasi ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ato~u kaʦato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan ato~u kasaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan pasifanaʡaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. **kafaŋafaŋan to~u *** itija, maɾa o~u miɬ~ɮajħiwaj to~u jinʦiw no~u ikako~u~upo~u~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, misiʡajaw to~u kafafaɾiʦ kararawraw no~u taɾijo~uk a to~uʡaʦ, misaʡiʦəɾ to~u isiŋan no~u tajwan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ itija, ɾiməɾa to~u nipatirəŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a isiŋan to~u maʦo~uwataj ikako~utaj, saka maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa no~u ko~umintaŋ miko~uwan. patirəŋ to~u ikako~uka i takao~u *nikawrira, paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ko~umintaŋ ʦi fo~u~u sinian aʦi *ian siɾiaŋ maɾa ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u, ʦaaj ka tatami aʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ko~u ħaratəŋ a mikiwiko~u, kinapinapina masasiwto~uʦ. saka i **** miħəʦa, ɾijas sato~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ to~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u, misaʡiʦəɾ patirəŋ to~u no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan saka ʦəʦaj ikako~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u * takao~u sikako~ujin, sarakataj patirəŋ a ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan. **miʦikəro~uħ to~u kiwiko~u to~u takao~u ikako~u i, miʦikəro~uħ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi to~u no~u nijaħ ikako~u no~u tajwan iko~uako~u kiŋkiw matija to~u taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan. misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ misaʡo~upo~u to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, pakajni to~u itijaaj taɬ~ɮanʦaaj sjakaj no~u tajwan: apijan, mafij, ʦisawarakaj o~unər ko~u nikiŋkiwan a tajaɾ. **i nipikəriɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mapaɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj ikako~u, mapatirəŋ maʦakat ko~u saki aniniaj no~u tajwan a ikako~u kiŋkiw a kataɬ~ɮamaan, miʦo~uwat to~u o~unəran rəmas ato~u sapaijo~u, kinapinapina miħapiw to~u miso~uɾapan a rato~uħ ato~u nikiŋkiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮan. **saka "ikaka ko~u ninanaman, sakaʦəʦaj ko~u nikiŋkiwan" o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u ʡo~urip niŋra ko~uni. o~u taɬ~ɮamama no~u aniniaj ikako~u no~u tajwan *nəŋnəŋən ko~u ʡo~urip ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, matanəŋ niŋra ko~u no~u manʦin sako~uwan, piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u piəpəʦ sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ni *iaŋ wəisħo~u~ui misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u siʦian a so~ufaɾ, nika ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra ko~u sapaini to~u sjakaj no~u tajwan, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮait faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u maɾaisiŋaj, saki ikako~u taɬ~ɮamaan so~ufaɾ paʡo~urip to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itini i pisaʡiʦəɾ niŋra, o~u takao~u ikako~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u, tajwan ikako~ujin, kaʡamis ko~u ʦəʦaj katimo~uɾ ko~u ʦəʦaj, o~u pipatirəŋ paranaʡan to~u tanəktəkaj saki iko~uao~u isiŋan ato~u ikako~u kiwiko~u aniniaj no~u tajwan.
S.FORM: == Du Chongming == Piharatengan to kapatay romi'ad ni Du Chongming ising ​Ci Du Chongming hakasi (1893miheca 8 folad 25 romi'ad－1986 miheca 2 folad 25 romi'ad), masofoc i pikowan no Mancin kitakit a sakowan itira i Sanzhi no Tansui, nano emangan ko tadamaan no kacingangan, mafenekay tamdaw, misawad i Hobu koritsu kakko o saka cecay pakaala to "Taywan sotokufu ikaku-in", marikec ko pikowan no micalapay sifo no Dipong to saki Hokaku sici kakupu, o kalaising ko safaloco'an no kaemangay no Taywan itiya. ​Macodahay kapah milimek sapipatayan ci Yuan Shikai ​I 1910 miheca Mancin kitakit makerih to sapisadadahalaw to Taywan, nika mafiyol no kapot a mitilid ci Weng Junmingan, oya ci Du Congming aci Jiang Weishui miceroh to Conghua kemintang, ikor marepet ni Yuan Shikai ko Congko sakowan, o na tatayra ci Du Congming aci Weng Junming i Beijing itiya i, misahalaka kao masekel ko sapipatay ci Yuan Shikaian, nika tada makedec ko mitena'ay misimaw caay aca ka laheci. ​​Tada o marokrokay ko sapikapotaw to Congko a miceroh, matiya o nipitilid k nika tadamaan ningra, i pikowan no Dipong to Taywan itiya, o sakacecay kacingangan ningra misawad to ising kakko, saka madama no pitilidan tayra i Dipong a mitilid haca, malaheci pakaala to Kyoto teikoku daikaku ikakupu, minanam to iyo kakko ato Yakuri-gakuoyopi naika. ​​​I 1922 miheca, pakaala to hakasi no ikakko ci Du Chongming, saka nicalapan kanatal no Dipong kitakit, o sakacecay pakaalaay to hakasi to Teikoku daigaku igakupu a taywam tamdaw, saki rayray no Taywan o sakacecay ikakko a hakasi. ​​​​Paherek ko katadamaan to nipitilid i, caay ka siday cingra i Diong matayal, minokay tayni niyaro' a Taywan, citodong to Cisi ikakupu kyosu, ikor onini pitilidan palekapotan to Taypi Teikoku daikaku, saka aniniay a "Kokuritsu Taywan daigaku igakupu". Misafaloco' miterek to 'icel saki isingan no Taywan ​I 1945 miheca saka 2 kalaloodan, micada mikowan ko komintang to Taywan, miocor ko hakasi no Cuo kenkyuyin ci Luo Zongluo to kacitodong tayal i Taihoku teikoku daikaku. Nawhani awaay cango'ot ko inanengay tamdaw no komintang to tadamanay to isingan tamdaw, nanoya tahidangen o sakacecay isingan hakasi ci Du Chongming ato kacatorod to isingan ato kasacitodongan pasifana'ay no Dipong. ​​Kafangafangan to 228 itiya, mala o miDayhiway to yinciw no Ikakupu ci Du Chongming, misi'ayaw to kafafalic kararawraw no taliyok a to'ac, misa'icel to isingan no Taywan ci Du Chongming itiya, limela to nipatirengan no Dipong a isingan to macowatay ikakotay, saka masongila' ko picada no komintang mikowan. Patireng to ikakoka i Takao ​Nikawrira, padadoedo saan miocor ko komintang ci Fu Sinian aci Qian Siliang mala 'a'isidan no Taywan daykako, caay ka tatami aci Du Chongming ko harateng a mikiwiko, kinapinapina masasiwtoc. Saka i 1954 miheca, liyas sato ci Du Chongming to Taywan daykako, misa'icel patireng to no finawlan no Taywan saka cecay ikako daykako – Takao sikakoyin, sarakatay patireng a 'a'isidan. ​​Micikeroh to kiwiko to Takao ikako i, micikeroh ci Du Chongming hakasi to no niyah ikako no Taywan ikoako kingkiw matiya to tadamaan ko nidemakan. Misarocod misa'opo to tadamaanay tamdaw sakapot, pakayni to itiyaay tadancaay syakay no Taywan: Apiyan, Mafiy, cisawarakay oner ko nikingkiwan a tayal. ​​I nipikerid ni Du Chongming, dengan o adadaay mapadipot to fa'elohay ikako, mapatireng macakat ko saki aniniay no Taywan a ikako kingkiw a katadamaan, micowat to oneran remas ato sapaiyo, kinapinapina mihapiw to misolapan a ratoh ato nikingkiwan a tilidan. ​​Saka "ikaka ko ninanaman, sakacecay ko nikingkiwan" o tadamaanay nisafaloco'an no 'orip ningra koni. O tadamama no aniniay ikako no Taywan ​Nengnengen ko 'orip ni Du Chongming, mataneng ningra ko no Mancin sakowan, picalap no Dipong ato piepec sakowan no komintang, talacowa caay ka lecad to ni Jiang Weishui misarocod to sician a sofal, nika ci Du Chongming hakasi o katadamaan ningra ko sapaini to syakay no Taywan, o kodait faloco' no malaisingay, saki ikako tadamaan sofal pa'orip to 'alomanay tamdaw, itini i pisa'icel ningra, o Takao ikako daykako, Taywan ikakoyin, ka'amis ko cecay katimol ko cecay, o pipatireng parana'an to tanektekay saki ikoao isingan ato ikako kiwiko aniniay no Taywan.
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ == piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ isiŋ *ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi (****miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), maso~ufo~uʦ i piko~uwan no~u manʦin kitakit a sako~uwan itira i san*ħi no~u tanso~u~ui, nano~u əmaŋan ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kaʦiŋaŋan, mafənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw, misawaɬ~ɮ i ħo~ub~b~vo~u~u ko~uritso~u~u kakko~u o~u saka ʦəʦaj pakaaɾa to~u "tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u ikako~u~u-in", marikəʦ ko~u piko~uwan no~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u saki ħo~ukako~u~u siʦi kako~u~upo~u~u, o~u kaɾaisiŋ ko~u safaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u kaəmaŋaj no~u tajwan itija. *maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj kapaħ miɾimək sapipatajan ʦi jo~u~uan sħikai *i **** miħəʦa manʦin kitakit makəriħ to~u sapisaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaw to~u tajwan, nika mafijo~uɾ no~u kapo~ut a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi wəŋ *o~u~unmiŋan, o~uja ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦo~uŋmiŋ aʦi *iaŋ wəisħo~u~ui miʦəro~uħ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua kəmintaŋ, iko~ur marəpət ni jo~u~uan sħikai ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u sako~uwan, o~u na tatajra ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦo~uŋmiŋ aʦi wəŋ *o~u~unmiŋ i b~b~vəijiŋ itija i, misaħaɾaka kao~u masəkəɾ ko~u sapipataj ʦi jo~u~uan sħikaian, nika taɬ~ɮa makəɬ~ɮəʦ ko~u mitənaʡaj misimaw ʦaaj aʦa ka ɾaħəʦi. **taɬ~ɮa o~u maro~ukro~ukaj ko~u sapikapo~utaw to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a miʦəro~uħ, matija o~u nipitiɾiɬ~ɮ k nika taɬ~ɮamaan niŋra, i piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan itija, o~u sakaʦəʦaj kaʦiŋaŋan niŋra misawaɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋ kakko~u, saka maɬ~ɮama no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħaʦa, maɾaħəʦi pakaaɾa to~u kjo~uto~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u ikako~u~upo~u~u, minanam to~u ijo~u kakko~u ato~u jako~u~uri-*ako~u~uo~ujo~upi naika. ***i **** miħəʦa, pakaaɾa to~u ħakasi no~u ikakko~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, saka niʦaɾapan kanataɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kitakit, o~u sakaʦəʦaj pakaaɾaaj to~u ħakasi to~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮai*ako~u~u i*ako~u~upo~u~u a tajwam tamɬ~ɮaw, saki rajraj no~u tajwan o~u sakaʦəʦaj ikakko~u a ħakasi. ****paħərək ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan to~u nipitiɾiɬ~ɮ i, ʦaaj ka siɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra i ɬ~ɮio~uŋ matajaɾ, mino~ukaj tajni nijaro~uʡ a tajwan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦisi ikako~u~upo~u~u kjo~uso~u~u, iko~ur o~unini pitiɾiɬ~ɮan paɾəkapo~utan to~u tajpi təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u, saka aniniaj a "ko~uko~u~uritso~u~u tajwan ɬ~ɮai*ako~u~u i*ako~u~upo~u~u". misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ mitərək to~u ʡiʦəɾ saki isiŋan no~u tajwan *i **** miħəʦa saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, miʦaɬ~ɮa miko~uwan ko~u ko~umintaŋ to~u tajwan, mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ħakasi no~u ʦo~u~uo~u kənkjo~u~ujin ʦi ɾo~u~uo~u *o~uŋɾo~u~uo~u to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ tajaɾ i taiħo~uko~u~u təiko~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaikako~u~u. nawħani awaaj ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u inanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ko~umintaŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj to~u isiŋan tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja taħiɬ~ɮaŋən o~u sakaʦəʦaj isiŋan ħakasi ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ato~u kaʦato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan ato~u kasaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan pasifanaʡaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. **kafaŋafaŋan to~u *** itija, maɾa o~u miɬ~ɮajħiwaj to~u jinʦiw no~u ikako~u~upo~u~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, misiʡajaw to~u kafafaɾiʦ kararawraw no~u taɾijo~uk a to~uʡaʦ, misaʡiʦəɾ to~u isiŋan no~u tajwan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ itija, ɾiməɾa to~u nipatirəŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a isiŋan to~u maʦo~uwataj ikako~utaj, saka maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa no~u ko~umintaŋ miko~uwan. patirəŋ to~u ikako~uka i takao~u *nikawrira, paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ko~umintaŋ ʦi fo~u~u sinian aʦi *ian siɾiaŋ maɾa ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u, ʦaaj ka tatami aʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ko~u ħaratəŋ a mikiwiko~u, kinapinapina masasiwto~uʦ. saka i **** miħəʦa, ɾijas sato~u ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ to~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u, misaʡiʦəɾ patirəŋ to~u no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan saka ʦəʦaj ikako~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u * takao~u sikako~ujin, sarakataj patirəŋ a ʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan. **miʦikəro~uħ to~u kiwiko~u to~u takao~u ikako~u i, miʦikəro~uħ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi to~u no~u nijaħ ikako~u no~u tajwan iko~uako~u kiŋkiw matija to~u taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan. misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ misaʡo~upo~u to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, pakajni to~u itijaaj taɬ~ɮanʦaaj sjakaj no~u tajwan: apijan, mafij, ʦisawarakaj o~unər ko~u nikiŋkiwan a tajaɾ. **i nipikəriɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mapaɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj ikako~u, mapatirəŋ maʦakat ko~u saki aniniaj no~u tajwan a ikako~u kiŋkiw a kataɬ~ɮamaan, miʦo~uwat to~u o~unəran rəmas ato~u sapaijo~u, kinapinapina miħapiw to~u miso~uɾapan a rato~uħ ato~u nikiŋkiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮan. **saka "ikaka ko~u ninanaman, sakaʦəʦaj ko~u nikiŋkiwan" o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u ʡo~urip niŋra ko~uni. o~u taɬ~ɮamama no~u aniniaj ikako~u no~u tajwan *nəŋnəŋən ko~u ʡo~urip ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ, matanəŋ niŋra ko~u no~u manʦin sako~uwan, piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u piəpəʦ sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ni *iaŋ wəisħo~u~ui misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u siʦian a so~ufaɾ, nika ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ħakasi o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra ko~u sapaini to~u sjakaj no~u tajwan, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮait faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u maɾaisiŋaj, saki ikako~u taɬ~ɮamaan so~ufaɾ paʡo~urip to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itini i pisaʡiʦəɾ niŋra, o~u takao~u ikako~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u, tajwan ikako~ujin, kaʡamis ko~u ʦəʦaj katimo~uɾ ko~u ʦəʦaj, o~u pipatirəŋ paranaʡan to~u tanəktəkaj saki iko~uao~u isiŋan ato~u ikako~u kiwiko~u aniniaj no~u tajwan.
